inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai aur bahut badhi sir dard ho rahi hai

inputs.text: Meri aankhon ke peeche dard ho rahi hai aur haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

inputs.text: Mera bukhar utar gaya hai, lekin ab meri twacha par lal daane nikal aaye hain aur masoodon se khoon aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is unlikely given the specific combination of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of typical symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bhi bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, lekin bukhar toh utar gaya hai
